economic_notes: Welamukotok Wellness is a controlled business enterprise consolidated but with qualified audit opinion due to insufficient evidence. OFN Fuels inventory of $427,122 indicates fuel retail operations.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified due to Welamukotok Wellness controlled business enterprise - auditors could not obtain sufficient evidence over $539,652 revenues, $452,485 expenses, $117,355 cash, $126,855 inventory. accounts_receivable includes both accounts receivable ($775,693) and due from government organizations ($1,737,438). current_liabilities includes accounts payable ($426,390) and due to government organizations ($1,857,519) excluding land claim and long-term debt. total_government_transfers includes ISC $15,249,250 + DFO $273,121 + Province of NB $543,637 + CMHC $545,474 = $16,611,482. osr includes Retail Sales $11,985,633 + Other $2,796,587 = $14,782,220. Child and Family Services expenditure $4,660,893 and Fisheries $945,893 and Forestry $222,473 not mapped to standard categories above.
